productDisplayName: Nike Women Black Air Total Sports Shoes
description: Style Note A lightweight foot style option for cross-country walking, running or training, the nike Air Total Core combines performance with enhanced style. This white and mint green pair is a shoe closet essential that is designed to pamper your feet (and doubles as a casual shoe!) Product Details Synthetic upper with central lace ups Has a padded inner and tongue Upper adhered to the outsole Square lugs at the midfoot region of the TPU outsole and exaggerated herringbone grooves att he toe and heel region Material and Care Synthetic Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean  Do not store under sunlight
